title: Part One: Thomas Kinkade: the Evil-est Painter
description:
Robert sits back down with Randy Milholland to discuss Thomas Kinkade, the most financially successful American artist and con-man.

Behind the Bastards is now available on YouTube!

New videos every Wednesday and Friday.
